title: Subscription Management
managePlan: Manage your subscription plan and billing
freePlanDescription: You're on the free plan with limited features.
starterPlanDetails: Perfect for established wedding planners with a growing business.
proPlanDetails: For professional wedding planners with multiple clients and advanced needs.

securePayment.title: Secure Payment
securePayment.description: Your payment information is processed securely via Stripe. We do not store your credit card details.

checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. No changes were made to your subscription.

cancelAlert.title: Subscription Cancellation
cancelAlert.description: Your subscription will remain active until {{date}}, after which you'll be downgraded to the Free plan.

demoMode.title: Demo Mode
demoMode.description: This is a demonstration. In a real application, you would be redirected to a payment processor to complete your subscription.

noSubscription.title: No Active Subscription
noSubscription.description: You're currently on the Free plan. Upgrade to access more features and capabilities.

billingHistoryDescription: View and download your past invoices.
noInvoices: No invoices yet. Invoices will appear here after your first payment.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailed.description: Your last payment attempt failed. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

trial.activeDescription: Your free trial ends on {{date}}. Upgrade to keep access to {{plan}} features.
trial.expiredDescription: Your free trial has expired. Upgrade now to regain access to premium features.

guard.title: Premium Feature
guard.description: Access to {{feature}} requires a paid subscription plan.
guard.pastDueWarning: Your subscription payment is overdue. Please update your payment method.
guard.trialExpired: Your trial period has expired. Upgrade to continue using premium features.

featureGate.title: Premium Feature
featureGate.description: This feature requires a paid subscription. Upgrade your plan to unlock it.

resourceLimit.title: Resource Limit Reached
resourceLimit.description: You've reached the limit for {{resourceType}} on your current plan.
